commands.addrole: Gives a role to a member, by mention or ID (restricted like nuke: owners + those allowed via +nukeadd)
commands.afk: Marks you as away (AFK) — removed automatically when you come back
commands.alertconfig: Configure alerts: in-channel ping (@everyone/@here/role/none) and your DM alerts per server
commands.alertesnipe: Live security alert center (history, channel, role, repeat delay) — refreshes itself (owner)
commands.announce: Schedules an announcement in the channel after a delay
commands.antibot: Antibot: strict (on), smart (checks name+ID) or off, + removes unknown bots
commands.aura: Farm your aura points 🟣: a slick move gains some, a cringe moment loses some. Per-server leaderboard
commands.heist: Aura heist 🦝: try to rob a member. Success = the victim loses aura and you earn XP, failure = jail (cooldown + fine)
commands.quidit: Who said it? 🕵️ The bot quotes a real past message from the channel — guess its author among 4 to win XP
commands.enigme: Riddle hunt 🧩: the bot posts a riddle, the first to type the correct answer in chat wins XP
commands.autoevents: Automatic surprise events (XP rain, quick draw) to keep the server lively without anyone launching anything
commands.grade: Grades of the Imperium 🎖️ (Warhammer 40k): activity-based progression ladder (Aspirant → Primarch) with an auto-role at each tier
commands.casino: Imperial Casino 🎰: bet your aura on the 40k slot machine, blackjack or roulette — winnings are paid in XP (your stake is consumed)
commands.war: Grimdark territory war 🗺️: Warhammer factions conquer a map of 40k sectors, week after week. `+war push` to fight for your faction
commands.missions: Daily contracts 🎯: 3 missions a day (win battles, farm, play…) that pay XP, plus a bonus for clearing all three
commands.ligue: Ranked PvP league 🏅: your +warhammer @x duels earn MMR (Bronze → Silver → Gold → Grimdark), monthly season with end-of-season rewards (Champion role + XP)
commands.jeux: Games hub 🎮: lists all the bot's games and explains how the economy works (aura ↔ XP)
commands.scenario: Grimdark narrative event 🗳️: the bot posts a scenario, the server votes, and the outcome impacts the territory war (+war)
commands.enquete: Co-op investigation “Heresy Aboard” 🕵️: a grimdark whodunit — clues drop in the channel, the server investigates and votes the traitor to win XP
commands.objectif: Weekly server goal 🏆: a collective target (farm XP, win battles…) with a shared progress bar — every contributor is rewarded if it's reached
commands.shop: Aura shop 🛒: spend your aura on perks (anti-heist shield, jail bail-out, streak shield, nickname color) and on server roles
commands.autorole: Automatically gives a role to new members
commands.autoslowmode: Enables slowmode automatically during a message spike (removed when calm)
commands.avatar: Shows a member's avatar (mention or ID)
commands.backup: Backs up the server (roles, channels, settings) or only roles + channels, and restores after a nuke
commands.ban: Bans a member from the server (mention or ID, even off-server)
commands.base: Panel of enabled protections, live. `+base channel` creates a permanent dedicated channel (owner)
commands.bl: Blacklists a member: they can no longer receive any role and are auto-banned as soon as they (re)join
commands.bot: Full bot dashboard (connection, security, monitoring, activity, code, system)
commands.bug: Report a bug to the staff (panel with categories + free report)
commands.case: Shows the details of a moderation case by its number
commands.changelogdm: Enables or disables receiving the bot changelog in DM
commands.close: Closes the current ticket and archives the transcript in the logs
commands.config: Shows the server's full current configuration
commands.customperm: Sets the required tier of a command (or via +setup → Per-command permissions)
commands.daily: Daily reward 🔥: come back every day for a streak — the longer it runs, the bigger the XP payout, with milestone jackpots. Clear your contracts (+missions) to earn a 🛡️ streak shield. `+daily top` for the leaderboard
commands.delrole: Removes a role from a member, by mention or ID (restricted like addrole: owners + allowed via +nukeadd)
commands.devine: Guess the mystery number (the bot tells you higher / lower)
commands.dm: Sends a private message to a member (mention or ID)
commands.doc: Shows the link to the online documentation in a nice embed, with a direct-access button.
commands.embed: Creates a custom embed (title | description | image, supports {var:name})
commands.errorlog: Sets the channel where the bot's errors are posted (owner)
commands.exportconfig: Shows this server's ID to clone its settings to another
commands.firedrill: Dry-run attack drill: simulates a raid/nuke and shows what would happen, with a readiness score (no real action)
commands.gameleaderboard: Game wins leaderboard (quiz, lotto, guess, fun poll)
commands.saison: Seasonal game leaderboard (reset every month — the podium is rewarded with XP). +gameleaderboard is the all-time board
commands.memory: Solo memory game 🧠: find the 8 emoji pairs in as few tries as possible — the more efficient you are, the more XP you win
commands.demineur: Solo minesweeper 💣: reveal gems to grow your XP pot, avoid the 3 bombs, and cash out before you blow up — risk vs reward
commands.joueur: Toggle the 🎮 Player role: get pinged when a tournament or a big game starts
commands.tournoi: Elimination tournament 🎪: sign up, then face others in reaction duels (first to click when the button turns green) up to the final — the champion wins XP
commands.gay: The gay-meter: measures a member's gayness rate (for laughs)
commands.guide: Security setup guide: a live checklist (what's in place / what to enable) with your protection progress
commands.oncall: On-call: critical alerts wake up the staff who are actually around first (in voice / recently active). on/off + who's reachable
commands.panic: Incident mode: in one command, lock the whole server + verification to max + antiraid MAX during an attack (reversible in one click)
commands.secu: Unified security panel: toggle on/off the recent modules (on-call, config drift, self-bots, webhooks, entry challenge, progressive trust, monthly digest, raid shield)
commands.wizard: Step-by-step setup assistant: one step at a time (logs, alert role, hardening, verification, backup) with Do / Skip — hardens the safe steps for you
commands.fleet: Fleet overview (owner): protection score, recent incidents, quarantines and un-hardened servers across ALL guarded servers, at a glance
commands.giveaway: Starts a giveaway (possible conditions: role, level)
commands.help: Shows the paginated help menu, or the details of a command
commands.importconfig: Clones another server's settings to this one (owner)
commands.indice: Full ID card of a member (moderation + security + local & durable danger index)
commands.invite: Shows the link to add the bot to a server (embed + button)
commands.invites: Shows a member's invites (or the leaderboard)
commands.joincreate: "Hub" voice channel: joining it creates a personal temporary voice channel (Join-to-Create)
commands.kick: Kicks a member from the server
commands.recap: Community recap 📊: server growth, most active members, voice activity and top aura (the community counterpart of +digest)
commands.level: Unified profile card of a member: level/XP + aura, grade, league rank, streak and Warhammer (alias +profil)
commands.levelrole: Level rewards: automatically grants a role at a tier
commands.linkwl: Domain whitelist for antilink (links allowed despite antilink)
commands.lockdown: Panic mode: locks or unlocks all text channels
commands.loto: Lotto: take a ticket, the closest to the draw wins a big XP boost!
commands.massrole: Adds (or removes) a role to all human members of the server
commands.menu: Opens the bot configuration panel (alias of +setup)
commands.moveall: Moves all members in voice — or a specific member (mention/ID) — to a voice channel
commands.note: Private moderation notes on a member (staff only)
commands.nuke: Clears a channel by deleting then recreating it identically. `+nuke lock` protects a channel
commands.nukeadd: Allows a member to use the nuke command (or removes them)
commands.offbackup: Sends an encrypted backup in DM (off-server), or manages the weekly auto-send
commands.owner: Manages the bot owners (all permissions over the bot)
commands.perm: Permission tiers: assigns a role to an access level (mod/admin/owner)
commands.postmortem: Post-mortem of the last security alert: chronological timeline (who/what/when) + the bot's response and verdict
commands.prefix: Changes the bot prefix on this server
commands.punish: Configures automatic sanctions based on the number of infractions (strikes)
commands.purge: Deletes the recent messages of a specific member (this channel, or all with "all")
commands.quarantine: Lists quarantined members and lets you release or ban them
commands.quizz: Multiplayer quiz: 10 questions, the most correct answers wins an XP boost (rotating theme)
commands.raid: Gag: fake "hack/raid" sequence with a progress bar… then a big surprise
commands.reason: Edits the reason of an existing moderation case
commands.remind: Schedules a reminder (DM/channel) after a delay
commands.report: Discreetly reports a member to staff (with their security context: danger index, record, perms…)
commands.reset: Resets the bot's entire configuration on this server (double owner confirmation)
commands.rolemenu: Creates a button role menu (members assign roles themselves)
commands.sanctions: Shows or manages a member's warnings (mention or ID)
commands.safe: Checks whether a link or message is a scam / phishing (analysis + VirusTotal)
commands.say: Makes the bot speak in the channel (supports {var:name})
commands.scan: Scans the server, flags dangerous configurations and offers to fix them
commands.setlogs: Sets (or removes) the server's logs channel
commands.setstats: Creates configurable counter channels (members, humans, bots, boosts, roles, channels)
commands.setup: Opens the bot configuration panel (prefix, theme, logs, security, scan)
commands.ship: Calculates the love compatibility rate between two members
commands.snipe: Shows the channel's last deleted message, with navigation (◀ ▶) and deleted/edited toggle
commands.sondagefun: Poll game: vote a theme, then 5 rounds of "vote like the majority" with a leaderboard
commands.starboard: "Best-of" channel: messages with enough ⭐ get pinned there
commands.statut: Changes the bot's status (presence + activity), or resets it
commands.sticky: Pins a "floating" message that re-posts at the bottom of the channel
commands.tempban: Temporarily bans a member (auto-unban on expiry)
commands.tempsmute: Mutes a member (text + voice) for a given duration
commands.theme: Changes the bot's embed color (help menu, etc.)
commands.tupref: Starts a "Would you rather…?" (random, or custom: +tupref X or Y) with live votes 🅰️/🅱️
commands.undo: Reverses an attacker's damage on MEMBERS: unbans their victims + restores the roles they removed (post-raid recovery)
commands.unbl: Removes a member from the blacklist: they can receive roles again and are no longer banned on join
commands.unmute: Gives a member their voice back (removes text and voice mute)
commands.unowner: Removes a bot owner (mention or ID)
commands.unwl: Removes a member from the antiraid whitelist
commands.update: Checks for dependency updates, APPLIES them (npm install) and restarts the bot (owner)
commands.vacuum: Compacts the database (VACUUM) to reclaim freed space (owner)
commands.vc: Shows the active voice channels and their member count
commands.vcgift: Voice gift: random draw among members in voice (instant, timed or auto)
commands.voicexp: Enables/disables voice XP gain (5–9 XP/min, built-in anti-farm)
commands.vote: Gives the link to vote for the bot on top.gg (free, every 12h) — helps it climb the rankings
commands.warn: Gives a warning to a member (automatic sanction based on the tiers)
commands.warnexpiry: Sets the automatic expiry of warnings (in days)
commands.watchdog: Monitors the other pm2 bots and DMs you if one goes down (owner)
commands.wl: Whitelist: protects a trusted member (never sanctioned by antiraid)
commands.shield: Adaptive raid shield: automatically hardens the server's entrance during a threat surge
commands.threatnet: Cross-server threat network: a raider/scammer neutralized on one server is blocked on the others
commands.birthday: Save your birthday (automatic announcement on the day) — admin: channel / role / test
commands.changelog: Preview the next changelog (notes, removals, detected commands) before its automatic release
commands.diag: Live health check: database, Guardian AI, heartbeat, website and last deployment (owner)
commands.digest: Monthly security digest (protection score, incidents, growth) — instant preview, or on/off for the automatic monthly DM
commands.duo: Draws the « duo of the week »: 2 active members to get to know each other (icebreaker)
commands.growth: Server growth curve: joins and leaves over the last 14 days
commands.pet: The server mascot: the community feeds it by staying active… and it wastes away if things go quiet
commands.pulse: Server activity heatmap: which hours and days it is most alive
commands.ticket: Support ticket system: a button that opens a private channel with the staff
commands.counting: Counting channel: the community counts upward from 1, the bot validates and resets on mistakes
commands.morpion: Play tic-tac-toe against another member, using buttons
commands.steal: Steal an emoji (or sticker) from a message and add it to the server
commands.lockword: Panic word: a secret word that YOU type in chat to instantly lock down the whole server in an emergency
commands.music: The server's music (dedicated Hasu Music bot): how to use it, and how to invite it
commands.tierlist: Tier list (S→D): everyone makes THEIR OWN of the current theme (button → private panel, posted with their name). 14 items · curated themes or your own list.
commands.warhammer: Grimdark RP game (Warhammer 40k) — beta: turn-based battles with lore & war cries. Solo (AI with a special move) or +warhammer @player → choose Alliance (2v2 co-op) or War (PvP). +warhammer boss → co-op server boss: everyone fights it together for a shared reward.
commands.expedition: Solo Warhammer 40k roguelike (+expedition): travel across grimdark landscapes (with a matching GIF each leg), choose your path (climb the mountain or go around), face road events — surprise ambush, a merchant selling lore items to boost your stats, awe-inspiring or horrific scenery — and fight scaling enemies across 8 stages. Reach the end to earn XP.
commands.bang: Duel game: each round, 2 players face off to be the fastest in a random channel — the last one standing wins.
commands.audit: Runs the security self-audit on demand (detailed flaws + per-target actions). `+audit ignores` manages accepted flaws
commands.cooldown: Sets the anti-spam delay (cooldown) of a command on this server
